programme.title: Xue shan fei hu
programme.desc: After two heroes are killed, a treasure map inexplicably disappears -- until a decade later.

programme.title: The Ghouls
programme.desc: Three grave robbers explore a lost underground kingdom to find a powerful charm.

programme.title: The Thousand Faces of Dunjia
programme.desc: Members of a secret society use supernatural powers to battle an ancient creature.

programme.title: Legend of the Fist: The Return of Chen Zhen
programme.desc: Chen fakes his death and returns as a caped crime fighter.

programme.title: Tomiris
programme.desc: The story of Tomiris, the queen of of the steppe, who was destined to become a skillful warrior.

programme.title: Xue shan fei hu
programme.desc: After two heroes are killed, a treasure map inexplicably disappears -- until a decade later.

programme.title: The Pirates
programme.desc: Pirates and bandits hunt a grey whale after it swallows a royal stamp.

programme.title: Hunt The Wicked
programme.desc: As chaos erupts, detective Huang must expose a city's dark truth while outsmarting Wei.

programme.title: Kowloon Walled City
programme.desc: A street fighter in Northeast China decides to start a new life in Hong Kong's Kowloon Walled City.

programme.title: Kickboxer: Retaliation
programme.desc: MMA champ Kurt Sloane trains for a fight against a 400-pound killer in an underground death match.

programme.title: Memories of the Sword
programme.desc: A warrior goes on a mission to seek revenge for the death of her parents.

programme.title: The Pirates
programme.desc: Pirates and bandits hunt a grey whale after it swallows a royal stamp.

programme.desc: MMA champ Kurt Sloane trains for a fight against a 400-pound killer in an underground death match.

programme.title: Memories of the Sword
programme.desc: A warrior goes on a mission to seek revenge for the death of her parents.

programme.title: Ip Man: The Awakening
programme.desc: After stopping a kidnapping, a young Ip Man becomes the target of a human trafficking ring.
